name: EvoFit Trainer
description: A comprehensive fitness coaching platform that empowers personal trainers to manage clients, build workout programs, track progress, and grow their business — all without recurring subscription fees. Built as a direct alternative to platforms like Everfit, TrueCoach, and TrainHeroic that charge $50-200/month, EvoFit Trainer offers a one-time $299 lifetime license with the same professional-grade features.
imageAlt: EvoFit Trainer dashboard showing client management, workout tracking, and analytics for fitness professionals
features: 1,344-exercise library with GIF demonstrations and smart filtering by body part, equipment, and target muscle
AI-powered workout builder that generates personalized programs from the full exercise database
Real-time client management with progress tracking, body metrics, and workout history
Drag-and-drop program builder with progressive overload tracking and workout templates
Interactive analytics dashboard with strength progression charts and training volume insights
Integrated scheduling system with session booking, calendar views, and availability management
studentQuote: Finally, a platform that doesn't nickel-and-dime trainers every month. I paid once and I own it forever — the exercise library alone with 1,344 demos is worth the price.
